name: Pumpkin Oat Muffins - Mcdougall
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine pumpkin, brown sugar, egg substitute, soy milk, apple juice, oats, and raisins; blend well.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture all at once, stirring just enough to moisten.
4. Spoon batter into 3-inch muffin pan cups sprayed with non-stick spray, filling each cup about 2/3 full.
5. Spread topping on each muffin.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 18-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Toping:
1. In a bowl, combine 1/2 cup packed Brown Sugar, 1/2 cup unbleached flour, 1 tsp pumpkin pie spice, and 1/2 cup mashed pumpkin.
2. Mix until smooth.
